title: Simple Saturation
description: Quick shader with a slider to switch between grayscale/normal/oversaturated.
body:
# About Shader
* This lightweight shaderpack allows you to precisely adjust the overall saturation of your Minecraft world through a simple in-game slider.

# Gallery

## 0% Saturation
![0%](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/MEwabHnq/images/eb727b2e87eb121238ae2723096f5f0aa3c1b7b2.png)

## 50% Saturation (Normal colors)
![50%](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/MEwabHnq/images/b8d854d4f1c245c90a1eef667fce3fffda08842b.png)

## 100% Saturation
![100%](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/MEwabHnq/images/86096d52cadab1aea9f77709310f9ea74cb3d931.png)

## Slider
![Slider image](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/JamesCoalchiPortfolio/SimpleSaturationShader/refs/heads/main/Slider.png)

# Feedback & Support:
Found an issue or have a suggestion? Please report it here: [Issue Tracker](https://github.com/JamesCoalchiPortfolio/SimpleSaturationShader/issues)
